description: omo-agents lifecycle hooks: todo-continuation enforcement, dangerous command interception, post-edit LSP reminder, write-existing-file-guard, and comment-checker

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const todos=(h.tool_response&&h.tool_response.todos)||[];const inProgress=todos.filter(x=>x.status==='in_progress');const incomplete=todos.filter(x=>x.status!=='completed');if(inProgress.length>0){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚡ Task IN PROGRESS: "'+inProgress[0].content+'". Do NOT stop. Continue immediately to complete it.\n');}else if(incomplete.length>0){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] '+incomplete.length+' todo(s) remaining. Sisyphus: continue to next task.\n');}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const f=(h.tool_input&&(h.tool_input.file_path||h.tool_input.path))||'file';process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] File edited: '+f+'. Remember to check LSP diagnostics for type errors before marking task complete.
');const newStr=(h.tool_input&&(h.tool_input.new_string||h.tool_input.content))||'';if(newStr&&!/\.(test|spec|md)$/.test(f)){const lines=newStr.split('
');const commentLines=lines.filter(l=>/^\s*(//|#|\*)/.test(l)).length;const ratio=lines.length>10?commentLines/lines.length:0;if(ratio>0.4){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️ High comment ratio ('+Math.round(ratio*100)+'%). Avoid excessive comments — code should be self-documenting.
');}}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(h.tool_input&&h.tool_input.command)||'';const dangerous=[/rm\s+-rf\s+[\/~]/,/git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)\b/,/DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE)\s/i,/chmod\s+777\s+-R/,/mkfs\./,/dd\s+if=.*of=\/dev/];const hit=dangerous.find(p=>p.test(cmd));if(hit){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️  DANGEROUS COMMAND DETECTED: '+cmd.slice(0,120)+'\nThis command matches a dangerous pattern. Please confirm you intend to run this.\n');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const fp=h.tool_input&&(h.tool_input.file_path||h.tool_input.path);if(fp&&fs.existsSync(fp)){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️  WRITE-GUARD: "'+fp+'" already exists. You should READ the file first before overwriting it. Use Edit instead of Write for existing files to preserve context.\n');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}})"
